subject: Blood Panel Results - Follow Up Needed
snippet: Timothy, your quarterly labs are back. A1C is 7.4, creatinine 1.4, eGFR 68. Let's discuss at your next appointment.

subject: Fence Line Section 4 - Cost Split
snippet: Tim, got the estimate for the shared fence section 4 repair. Total is $2,400. My half, your half. Let me know.

subject: Spring Grazing Workshop - April 12
snippet: Tim, the spring grazing management workshop is April 12 at the Extension office. Can you mentor again?

subject: Invoice #4782 - March Feed Order
snippet: Invoice for your March feed delivery. 40 bags premium cattle feed. Total: $847.00.

subject: URGENT: Veteran Ranch Preservation Grant - Action Required
snippet: Dear Mr. Pratt, You've been selected for our Veteran Ranch Preservation Grant ($15,000). To process payment, we need your SSN and bank routing number.

subject: Town Council Agenda - March 24
snippet: Tim, agenda for tomorrow's meeting: 1) Bridge 464 maintenance report, 2) Spring road grading budget, 3) Memorial park updates. Zoom link if storm makes travel unsafe.

subject: VFW Friday Night
snippet: Tim, VFW's doing a fish fry Friday. You in? Could use the company.

subject: Tyler Spring Break Plans
snippet: Dad, Tyler is so excited about the ranch. I'm thinking of driving up Wednesday instead of putting him on the bus. Should arrive by noon. Is that ok?

subject: Invoice #VET-2703 - March Ranch Visit
body: Dear Timothy, Please find attached the invoice for Dr. Whitford's March 18 ranch visit. Services: Herd check (12 head) $250, Tag #131 twin delivery assist $150, Emergency supplies $85. Total: $485. Payment due within 30 days. Thank you, Whitford Veterinary Clinic

subject: Delivery Confirmation - 50 Bales Timothy Hay
body: Hi Timothy, This confirms delivery of 50 bales of Timothy hay to your ranch on March 15. Delivery was signed for by your hand Daniel. These bales are from the new cut and should be stored under cover. Invoice #FS-4821 for $625 will follow. Thanks, Browning Feed & Supply

subject: Re: Tyler This Weekend
snippet: Tyler can't come this weekend, wrestling tournament
body: Hi Dad, Bad news - Tyler's wrestling tournament got moved to this Saturday so he can't make it out to the ranch this weekend after all. He's really disappointed. Maybe next weekend if the weather clears? Dan says hi. Love, Elaine
